sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n22455" key="glwtti/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">γλωττ-ίζω</orth>, <sense id="n22455.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">kiss lasciviously, bill,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.128</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Autom.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
